title: SPOT-OD v1.3.0 edge-only residual-refinement ablation
description: SPOT-OD v1.3.0-edge-only-residual-refine adds the edge-only retained-candidate residual-refinement ablation. The new --node-disagreement-features omit setting removes eight node disagreement aggregate fields, reducing node feature dimension from 30 to 22 while keeping edge feature dimension at 10. In the edge-only attention residual-refine configuration, all non-development runs reach 373.728 m versus the best retained candidate at 459.591 m, an 18.682% gain, and versus the matched edge-only local/no-message control at 562.030 m, a 33.504% advantage. Fresh seeds 151/157/163/167 reach 364.229 m versus the best retained candidate at 445.943 m, an 18.324% gain, and versus the matched local control at 814.283 m, a 55.270% advantage. The edge-only mean graph remains a closer but weaker mixed result at 386.224 m across all non-development runs and 380.065 m on fresh seeds. Evidence scope remains limited to retained-candidate compact-simulator evidence; graph-path isolation is only against the matched edge-only no-message local control. This release is not operational POD, not public precise-reference validation, not independent-machine reproduction, not a full raw/training/all-filter rerun, not standalone learned recursive filtering, not broad learned-OD validation, and not operational learned OD.
notes: This v1.3.0 release is not metadata-only. It adds the edge-only retained-candidate residual-refinement ablation for tag v1.3.0-edge-only-residual-refine. The --node-disagreement-features omit setting removes eight node disagreement aggregate fields, reducing node dimension from 30 to 22 while retaining edge dimension 10. Edge-only attention residual-refine reaches 373.728 m across all non-development runs versus the best retained candidate at 459.591 m (18.682% gain) and versus the matched edge-only local/no-message control at 562.030 m (33.504% advantage). Fresh seeds 151/157/163/167 reach 364.229 m versus the best retained candidate at 445.943 m (18.324% gain) and versus the matched local control at 814.283 m (55.270% advantage). The edge-only mean graph is closer but weaker mixed evidence at 386.224 m all non-development and 380.065 m fresh. The concept DOI remains 10.5281/zenodo.20768672. No DOI is asserted for v1.3.0 in this metadata. DOI 10.5281/zenodo.20840386 is cited as the prior clean Zenodo version, and DOI 10.5281/zenodo.20839901 is retained only as the earlier superseded metadata-inconsistent import. Scope limits: retained-candidate compact-simulator evidence only; graph-path isolation only against the matched edge-only no-message local control; not operational POD, not public precise-reference validation, not independent-machine reproduction, not full raw/training/all-filter rerun, not standalone learned recursive filtering, not broad learned-OD validation, and not operational learned OD.
